fixes.title: OS command injection: untrusted input reaches execSync()
fixes.fix: Use execFile with an argv array; never build a shell string from input.

fixes.title: SQL injection: untrusted input reaches query()
fixes.fix: Use a parameterized query (placeholders), never string concatenation.

fixes.title: Cross-site scripting (reflected): untrusted input reaches send()
fixes.fix: Use execFile with an argv array; never build a shell string from input.

rootCauses.cause: Untrusted request input concatenated into interpreters
rootCauses.note: Centralize input handling: parameterized queries + argv-array exec, plus an input-validation layer.
